Jersey discusses why he expects the Fed to remain on hold for at least the next several months, even after Jay Powell’s departure and Kevin Warsh’s expected arrival as chair. He examines the significance of recent FOMC dissents, the challenges Warsh may face in building support for rate cuts

title: Tech Disruptors: Seagate at the Center of AI Storage and Data
title_cn: 技术颠覆者：希捷处于人工智能存储和数据的中心
summary: Seagate has become a critical enabler of hyperscale and AI-driven data infrastructure. In this episode of the Tech Disruptors podcast, CEO Dave Mosley tells Bloomberg Intelligence analyst Woo Jin Ho how storage demand is evolving with cloud and AI workloads, from nearline hard-disk-drive adoption to next-generation technologies such as HAMR. The podcast also explores how AI is reshaping storage architecture and data growth, Seagate’s approach to supply discipline and margin expansion and how com

title: Vanguards of Health Care: RTW Investments on Biotech’s Bull Case
title_cn: 医疗保健先锋：RTW 对生物技术牛市的投资
summary: “I think this is going to be the most eventful ASCO for biotech in a while,” says Dr. Roderick Wong, founder of RTW Investments, referring to the annual meeting of the American Society of Clinical Oncology. Wong joins Bloomberg Intelligence analyst Sam Fazeli on the Vanguards of Health Care podcast to break down biotech’s rebound, why fundamentals may finally be improving after a prolonged bear market and how China’s speed and cost advantages are reshaping global drug discovery. They also explor

title: Stocks Halt Rally as Traders Await US-Iran Update: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 由于交易员等待美国与伊朗的最新消息，股市停止上涨：市场总结
summary: A rally that drove stocks to all-time highs faltered as traders awaited updates on a potential US-Iran peace deal that would revive energy flows through the key Strait of Hormuz.

title: BASF Coatings’ €3.9 Billion Debt Deal Lures Threefold Demand
title_cn: 巴斯夫涂料 39 亿欧元债务交易吸引三倍需求
summary: A debt package for the auto paint and finishing division of European chemicals firm BASF SE drew demand of over three times the deal’s size, as investor interest in the troubled sector starts to revive after months in the doldrums.

title: Genco Shipping CEO | Dry Bulk Sees Best Quarter Since 2022
title_cn: Genco 航运首席执行官 |干散货迎来 2022 年以来最好的季度
summary: Dry bulk shipping is booming again. Genco CEO John Wobensmith joins Bloomberg Open Interest to break down why this is the strongest quarter since 2022, how slower vessel speeds are quietly tightening supply, and why rising energy demand, fueled by AI and global power needs is unexpectedly driving the coal trade higher. (Correction | Updated name in description) (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Dips as US and Iran Weigh Deal to Reopen Strait of Hormuz
title_cn: 美国和伊朗考虑重新开放霍尔木兹海峡，油价下跌
summary: Oil dipped in a volatile session as the US waited on Iran’s response to its proposal to end the war and reopen the vital Strait of Hormuz.

title: Canada Miner Sherritt Pulls Out of Cuba on Sanctions Threat
title_cn: 加拿大矿工谢里特因制裁威胁退出古巴
summary: Sherritt International Corp. halted joint venture activities in Cuba after President Donald Trump expanded US sanctions on the communist-run Caribbean country.

title: Citadel Securities Clearing Own Stock Options in Break From BofA
title_cn: Citadel 证券清算公司拥有自己的股票期权，与美国银行决裂
summary: Citadel Securities is taking a do-it-yourself approach to clearing its equity options trades, bringing an end to a business relationship with Bank of America Corp. going back a quarter century.

title: BlackRock South Korea ETF Sees Record Exodus as AI Stocks Soar
title_cn: 随着人工智能股飙升，贝莱德韩国 ETF 出现创纪录的资金外流
summary: Investors pulled cash out of a BlackRock exchange-traded fund tracking South Korean equities at the fastest pace on record on Wednesday amid a broad-based rally that has taken the nation’s stock index to all-time highs.

title: Hybrid Bond Sales At Record as Companies Pounce on Low Costs
title_cn: 公司纷纷寻求低成本，混合债券销售创历史新高
summary: Companies are selling hybrid bonds at a record pace, seeking to pad their balance sheets while the extra cost of the risky debt hovers near an all-time low.

title: Kraft Heinz Joins Reverse Yankee Boom to Fund Debt Buyback
title_cn: 卡夫亨氏加入逆扬基繁荣行列为债务回购提供资金
summary: Kraft Heinz Foods Co came to Europe’s bond market for the first time in over a year to raise euro-currency debt that will help fund a buyback of dollar notes.

title: Iran's Leaders Meet as US Waits on Peace Deal Response
title_cn: 美国等待和平协议回应之际伊朗领导人会面
summary: Iran’s President Masoud Pezeshkian recently met with Supreme Leader Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei for nearly two and a half hours, the state-owned Mizan news agency reported Thursday as the US waits for a response to its proposal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and end the war. Tyler Kendall reports.   (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Mortgage Rates Jump for Second Week to 6.37%, Freddie Mac Says
title_cn: 房地美称抵押贷款利率连续第二周跃升至 6.37%
summary: Mortgage rates in the US jumped for the second straight week, a rise in borrowing costs that threatens to stall the spring home sales season.

title: Polish Drone Maker Eyes Significant Growth From EU Defense Loans
title_cn: 波兰无人机制造商希望通过欧盟国防贷款实现显着增长
summary: Polish producer of military drones WB Electronics sees the European Union’s loans-for-weapons program as a “significant growth factor” for the company that’s considering an initial public offering.

title: Oil Market Liquidity Dries Up as Traders Sit Out War Volatility
title_cn: 交易员静观战争波动，石油市场流动性枯竭
summary: Oil market liquidity has evaporated since the start of the US-Iran war, amplifying price moves in a benchmark seen as a bellwether for the global economy.

title: I Squared, Blackstone Eye €2.5 Billion Stroeer Buyout
title_cn: I Squared、Blackstone Eye 25 亿欧元收购 Stroeer
summary: I Squared and Blackstone Inc. are edging closer to making a bid for Stroeer SE & Co. that could value the German media group at about €2.5 billion ($2.9 billion), people familiar with the matter said.

title: Ethiopia Inflation Back in Double Digits on Biting Fuel Shortage
title_cn: 燃料短缺严重，埃塞俄比亚通胀率重回两位数
summary: Ethiopia’s inflation rate is back above 10% for the first time in five months, after fuel supply challenges pushed up the cost of almost everything.

title: Merz Slams UniCredit for Destroying Trust In Commerzbank Bid
title_cn: 默茨抨击联合信贷银行破坏了对商业银行投标的信任
summary: Chancellor Friedrich Merz reinforced his criticism of UniCredit SpA’s bid for Commerzbank AG, saying the Italian lender was destroying trust as it attempts to take over Germany’s second-largest bank.

title: IMF Warns Demand for Angola’s Bonds to Cool If Iran War Drags On
title_cn: 国际货币基金组织警告称，如果伊朗战争持续下去，对安哥拉债券的需求将会降温
summary: The International Monetary Fund said demand for Angola’s bonds will wane if the Iran war continues, putting pressure on inflation and the southern African nation’s currency amid higher import costs.

title: Venezuela Floods Market With Dollars to Ease Inflation Pressure
title_cn: 委内瑞拉向市场注入大量美元以缓解通胀压力
summary: Venezuela’s government is stepping up dollar sales and allowing the bolivar to weaken, narrowing the gap with the parallel market and easing pressure on inflation.

title: Credit Karma Opens Site for Americans Without Credit History
title_cn: Credit Karma 为没有信用记录的美国人开设网站
summary: Intuit Credit Karma is opening its site to Americans who have no credit history, allowing them to take the first steps to building credit.

title: Sany Group Is Said to Consider IPO for Electric Truck Unit in Hong Kong
title_cn: 传三一集团考虑电动卡车业务在香港IPO
summary: Chinese heavy equipment manufacturer Sany Group is considering a Hong Kong initial public offering for its electric truck business, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Israeli Shekel at 32-Year High Is Causing Angst in Tech Industry
title_cn: 以色列谢克尔创 32 年新高引发科技行业焦虑
summary: Despite global condemnation over Israel’s regional wars, the shekel is at a 32-year high, giving the government something to brag about, but fueling anxiety in the vital tech industry.

title: Oil Prices Are Moving Like Crazy, Citi's Layton Says
title_cn: 花旗银行的雷顿表示，油价走势疯狂
summary: Max Layton, Citigroup Inc.'s global head of commodities research, says oil prices will keep "moving around like crazy" as traders parse the conflicting signals coming out of Washington about if the Iran war is coming to an end. He speaks on Bloomberg Television's Surveillance. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gold Extends Hefty Gain as US-Iran Hopes Ease Inflation Fears
title_cn: 随着美国和伊朗希望缓解通胀担忧，金价大幅上涨
summary: Gold extended gains as optimism over a potential US-Iran deal pushed down oil and gas prices, tempering fears that inflation will limit the scope for interest rate cuts.

title: US Yields at 5% Tug Traders Between Dip-Buying Greed and Fear
title_cn: 美国收益率为 5% 拖船交易员在贪婪和恐惧之间徘徊
summary: In some circles on Wall Street, the hottest debate isn’t about a tech-stock bubble or $100 oil as the new norm. It’s whether 30-year Treasury yields will mount a sustained push over 5%.

title: Bloomberg Surveillance 5/7/2026
title_cn: 彭博社监测 2026 年 5 月 7 日
summary: Jonathan Ferro, Lisa Abramowicz and Annmarie Hordern speak daily with leaders and decision makers from Wall Street to Washington and beyond. No other program better positions investors and executives for the trading day. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fed’s Collins Favored Changing FOMC Statement With Dissenters
title_cn: 美联储柯林斯赞成改变联邦公开市场委员会的声明，但有异议
summary: Federal Reserve Bank of Boston President Susan Collins said she agreed with colleagues who dissented at last week’s monetary policy gathering over wording in the Fed’s post-meeting statement that suggested the central bank would eventually resume rate reductions.

title: MetLife’s Improved PE Returns Help Profit Beat Expectations
title_cn: 大都会人寿改善的市盈率回报帮助利润超出预期
summary: MetLife Inc.’s first-quarter earnings surpassed Wall Street expectations as the insurer continued to cash in higher gains from its private equity portfolio.

title: Citigroup’s Profitability Target Falls Short of Expectations
title_cn: 花旗集团盈利目标未达预期
summary: Citigroup issued new guidance showing it would take the lender more time to catch up to Wall Street peers than some investors hoped for. Sridhar Natarajan reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Kraken Parent to Buy Reap Technologies for $600 Million
title_cn: Kraken 母公司将以 6 亿美元收购 Reap Technologies
summary: The owner of crypto exchange Kraken has agreed to pay $600 million for Reap Technologies, a stablecoin-oriented provider of cross-border and business payments services.

title: MNTN CEO: TV Remains Dominant Medium as Streaming Grows
title_cn: MNTN 首席执行官：随着流媒体的发展，电视仍然是主导媒体
summary: MNTN CEO Mark Douglas joins Bloomberg Open Interest to push back on the idea that TV is dying, arguing it remains the most powerful entertainment medium on earth. He explains how streaming is opening TV advertising to new businesses, why AI video tools are lowering production costs, and why the World Cup could be a massive moment for advertisers. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Arm Sees ‘Explosion’ in CPU Demand on AI Amid Smartphone Slump
title_cn: 在智能手机低迷的情况下，Arm 认为 AI 对 CPU 的需求将出现“爆炸式增长”
summary: Arm Holdings Plc Chief Executive Officer Rene Haas said the company is experiencing an “explosion of demand” for its CPU architecture driven by AI workloads in data centers, with orders doubling to $2 billion in just five weeks.

title: TD’s eBay Financing Assumes GameStop Wins Longshot Credit Rating
title_cn: TD 的 eBay 融资假设 GameStop 赢得 Longshot 信用评级
summary: GameStop Corp.’s proposed $20 billion financing of its bid for eBay Inc. rests on the assumption that the combined company’s debt would be investment grade, a premise that people familiar with the matter and at least one ratings firm suggest is far from a sure thing.

title: Arm Slides After Smartphone Slowdown Overshadows AI Growth
title_cn: 智能手机放缓掩盖人工智能增长后，手臂滑落
summary: Arm Holdings Plc shares declined as much as 9% after a slowdown in the smartphone industry took a toll on the chip company’s royalty revenue, overshadowing its growth in the AI data center market.

title: Why AI Isn’t a Threat to Wall Street Traders Just Yet
title_cn: 为什么人工智能还没有对华尔街交易员构成威胁
summary:
Anthropic's latest AI agents are designed to win over Wall Street — but experiments show LLMs aren't ready to replace traders.

Justina Lee explains why your fund manager is safe in their job, for now. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Boom Drives Earnings Growth
title_cn: 人工智能热潮推动盈利增长
summary: Bernstein Private Wealth CIO Alex Chaloff says the market’s explosive earnings growth is being fueled by trillion-dollar AI spending from hyperscalers. But while AI may drive productivity and IPO demand, he warns the labor market could be the weak spot as companies increasingly ask what jobs AI can replace. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Eldridge CEO: Data Center Demand ‘Not Going Away’
title_cn: 埃尔德里奇首席执行官：数据中心需求“不会消失”
summary: Eldridge CEO Tony Minella discusses leaning into AI as an ‘enabler,’ why AI data center demand is not going away, and the undeniable strength of the equity markets. He talks with Katie Greifeld and Romaine Bostick at the Milken Institute Global Conference in Beverly Hills, California. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The Messy, Humiliating Courtroom Drama Between Elon Musk and OpenAI
title_cn: 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 与 OpenAI 之间混乱、羞辱的法庭戏剧
summary: Artificial intelligence companies were already unpopular before the billionaires started fighting in court.

title: GameStop CEO Says eBay Shut Account After Funding Stunt
title_cn: GameStop 首席执行官表示 eBay 在资助噱头后关闭了账户
summary: GameStop Corp. Chief Executive Officer Ryan Cohen said his eBay Inc. account was suspended following a publicity stunt in which he listed a raft of personal items — including a pair of socks — to fund his $56 billion bid for the online marketplace.

title: Datadog Shares Soar by Most in Six Years on Higher Outlook
title_cn: 展望更高，Datadog 股价六年来涨幅最大
summary: The shares of Datadog Inc. surged by the most in more than six years after the software developer raised its full-year outlook for sales and earnings, far exceeding Wall Street’s expectations.

title: Google Launches $100 Fitbit Air Without a Screen to Rival Whoop
title_cn: 谷歌推出售价 100 美元的无屏幕 Fitbit Air 与 Whoop 竞争
summary: Alphabet Inc.’s Google on Thursday launched the Fitbit Air, a $100 screenless fitness band aimed squarely at taking on Whoop Inc. and other makers of health and fitness wearables that forgo displays.

title: BCE Beats on AI-Powered Business, Higher Revenue
title_cn: BCE 在人工智能驱动的业务和更高的收入方面表现出色
summary: BCE Inc. beat analyst expectations in the first quarter as its investments in artificial intelligence infrastructure pay off.

title: CoreWeave’s Stunning Rally Creates Prove-It Moment for Earnings
title_cn: CoreWeave 的惊人反弹为盈利创造了证明时刻
summary: CoreWeave Inc. shares are on a scorching run in 2026 as demand for computing capacity to power artificial intelligence keeps growing. But now investors want to see some proof that the neo-cloud provider is executing on its ambitious plans.

title: AMD Rallies After AI Demand Fuels Blockbuster Forecast
title_cn: 人工智能需求推动了重磅预测，AMD 股价上涨
summary:
Advanced Micro Devices Inc., the leading challenger to Nvidia Corp. in AI computing chips, soared to a record in early trading after a flood of data center spending bolstered its sales forecast.
Second-quarter revenue will be $11.2 billion, plus or minus $300 million, the company said in a statement Tuesday. That compares with an average analyst prediction of $10.5 billion, according to data compiled by Bloomberg.  Bloomberg's Kunjan Sobhani joins Bloomberg Intelligence to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BlackRock Private Debt Fund Cuts Asset Value on Loan Markdowns
title_cn: 贝莱德私人债务基金因贷款降价而削减资产价值
summary: BlackRock Inc. cut the value of its publicly-traded private credit fund by about 5%, as it struggled under the weight of troubled loans, markdowns and lower returns.

title: Peloton Raises Full-Year Outlook, Signaling Turnaround on Track
title_cn: Peloton 上调全年展望，标志着扭亏为盈
summary: Peloton Interactive Inc. raised its guidance for the full year, suggesting that a turnaround fueled by new commercial offerings and upgraded equipment is on track.

title: ‘Teflon Musk’ Rises Again in Twitter Deal With SEC
title_cn: Twitter 与 SEC 达成的协议中，“Teflon Musk”再次崛起
summary: Billionaire pays $1.5 million in settlement over disclosures of Twitter stock purchases

title: Google Translate Rival DeepL Announces Plans to Cut 25% of Staff
title_cn: 谷歌翻译竞争对手 DeepL 宣布计划裁员 25%
summary: DeepL, the German startup building translation tools, announced plans to cut approximately 25% of its workforce, a move its Chief Executive Officer Jarek Kutylowski attributed to the “massive structural shift” from artificial intelligence.

title: Foundering: Bob Lee, the Tech Industry, and the City That’s Become Its Reluctant Home
title_cn: 创始人：鲍勃·李（Bob Lee）、科技行业以及这座不情愿成为其家园的城市
summary: A year before Bob Lee was killed, San Francisco recalled its progressive district attorney, Chesa Boudin, in a campaign heavily funded by venture capitalists. They rallied around fear of crime.

title: EVs Next for Hong Kong Firm's Water-Soluble Battery Binder
title_cn: 香港公司的水溶性电池粘合剂将用于电动汽车
summary:
A water-soluble battery binder developed by Hong Kong-based GRST enables battery recycling with less pollution and greater recovery of critical metals, the company's chief strategy officer, Frank Harley, said in an interview at the BloombergNEF Summit New York on April 22, 2026. 

The firm "is making the first stage of recycling a lot simpler," Harley said.  Hong Kong-based GRST is "working with seven equipment manufacturers in China and the end customers for them are EVs, typically European EVs and consumer electronics," he said. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Tech-Sector Layoffs Keep Mounting as Other Job Cuts Decline
title_cn: 美国科技行业裁员人数持续增加，其他岗位裁员减少
summary: Planned job cuts continued to mount in the US technology sector last month, bringing the year-to-date total to a three-year high even as overall private-sector layoff announcements receded.

title: Ruchir Sharma on Why India Seems to Be on the Wrong Side of the AI Trade
title_cn: Ruchir Sharma 谈为何印度似乎站在人工智能贸易的错误一边
summary: India is being viewed as lagging the global AI trade as investors prioritise chips, compute and infrastructure. Ruchir Sharma explains how low R&D spending and exposure of software and outsourcing jobs are weighing on sentiment. He also outlines potential positives, including strong nominal GDP growth, a valuation reset opportunity, and the chance for India to benefit later as AI adoption shifts toward productivity gains. Rockefeller International Chairman Ruchir Sharma joined Haslinda Amin on Insight with Haslinda Amin. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Two Indian Conglomerates to Plow $1 Billion in EV, Battery Tech
title_cn: 两家印度企业集团将斥资 10 亿美元发展电动汽车和电池技术
summary: Two Indian conglomerates are looking to spend nearly $1 billion to build domestic capabilities in electric-vehicle and battery technologies, people familiar with the matter said, reflecting a growing urgency on the part of the country’s biggest companies to reduce their reliance on Chinese technology.

title: Amazon Cuts Workers, Phases Out Grocery Service in Singapore
title_cn: 亚马逊裁员并逐步取消新加坡的杂货服务
summary: Amazon.com Inc. said a “small number of roles” in Singapore will be impacted as it phases out local fulfillment including Amazon Fresh in the city-state.

title: US & Iran Weigh Potential Deal to End War as Trump Seeks Offramp | Daybreak Europe 5/7/2026
title_cn: 特朗普寻求出口，美国和伊朗正在权衡结束战争的潜在协议黎明欧洲 5/7/2026
summary:
On today's show, the US and Iran are considering a fresh proposal to end the war, as the US President searches for an exit from the conflict. Donald Trump says Iran has agreed that it cannot have a nuclear weapon, though Iranian state media have signaled that parts of the US proposal are unrealistic.

Bloomberg understands that China has told its biggest banks to suspend new loans to five refiners sanctioned by the US - reversing guidance from just four days ago.

Plus the German maker of medical equipment, Siemens Healthineers, cuts its full-year comparable sales forecast, saying the weaker outlook reflects structural changes in China's diagnostics market, along with stronger inflation pressures.

Today's guest: Bernd Montag, Siemens Healthineers, CEO.

Correct: Video edited at 00;01;20 to reflect German factory orders in graphic.
Correct: Video edited at 00;39;19 to replace incorrect graphic. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tech to Remain 'Resilient' to Higher Rates, JPM Says
title_cn: 摩根大通表示，科技行业将对利率上升保持“弹性”
summary: Fabio Bassi, head of cross-asset strategy at JPMorgan, discusses market sentiment as global equities rose on optimism that the US and Iran were nearing a deal. "The AI upstream theme is a critical diver of the dynamic of the equity market," Bassi tells Bloomberg Television. He adds that despite the oil supply shock in response to the situation in the Middle East, the message from earnings is still "positive."  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Zelenskiy’s Top Envoy Arrives in US to Renew Stalled Peace Talks
title_cn: 泽连斯基的高级特使抵达美国重启陷入僵局的和平谈判
summary: Ukraine’s chief negotiator Rustem Umerov arrived in the US for meetings with President Donald Trump’s envoys in a bid to reinvigorate stalled peace talks with Russia, President Volodymyr Zelenskiy said.

title: How Israel’s Battle With Lebanon’s Hezbollah Fits Into the Iran War
title_cn: 以色列与黎巴嫩真主党的战斗如何融入伊朗战争
summary: When the Lebanese militia Hezbollah entered the US-Israeli war against Iran by firing rockets and drones into Israel the day after the conflict began on Feb. 28, officials there saw in the crisis sweeping the region a chance to finally drive the militia, already weakened by a series of setbacks, away from Israel’s northern border. They’ve been loath to give it up.

title: Merz Responds to Industry Rebuke With Pledge to Move on Reforms
title_cn: 梅尔茨回应行业指责，承诺推进改革
summary: Chancellor Friedrich Merz told industry leaders that he’ll press ahead with his reform agenda after the head of a leading German business lobby called the conservative leader’s ruling coalition unreliable.

title: NY Announces $268 Billion Budget Deal Including Second-Home Tax
title_cn: 纽约州宣布 2680 亿美元的预算协议，其中包括第二居所税
summary: Hochul has resisted calls to raise income taxes on millionaires and large corporations ahead of competitive primary races.

title: Bulgaria’s Radev Picks Cabinet After Sweeping Victory
title_cn: 保加利亚的拉德夫大获全胜后任命内阁
summary: Bulgaria’s incoming Prime Minister Rumen Radev proposed his cabinet lineup as he prepares to take office after a landslide election victory, breaking years of political deadlock.

title: Saudi Arabia Boosted Logistics Spending to Blunt Impact of War
title_cn: 沙特阿拉伯增加物流支出以减轻战争影响
summary: Saudi Arabia brought forward some planned spending on infrastructure and food imports to soften the impact of the Iran war and the closure of the Strait of Hormuz, a move that added to its budget deficit in the first quarter.

title: Ukraine Said It Hit Major Oil Refinery Deep Inside Russia
title_cn: 乌克兰称袭击了俄罗斯境内的主要炼油厂
summary: Ukraine said it hit a major oil refinery deep inside Russia, as Moscow and Kyiv exchanged strikes ahead of Victory Day celebrations.

title: Are Texas Latinos Turning on Trump?
title_cn: 德克萨斯州的拉丁裔人会反对特朗普吗？
summary: South Texas was the epicenter of Trump’s growing Latino support in 2024, but now those trends might be in reverse, Bloomberg Opinion columnist Ronald Brownstein says. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Southeast Asia Sees Progress in Myanmar Years After the Coup
title_cn: 缅甸政变多年后，东南亚取得了进展
summary: Sentiment is warming among some Southeast Asian nations toward easing Myanmar’s isolation five years after a coup, with diplomats signaling a possible opening to bring the crisis-torn nation back into the fold.

title: Ghana Petitions AU to Examine Xenophobic Attacks in South Africa
title_cn: 加纳请求非盟调查南非的仇外袭击事件
summary: Ghana escalated a complaint over attacks on its citizens in South Africa, urging the African Union to weigh in after a spate of anti-foreigner protests fanned fears of xenophobic violence.

title: Brazil Police Target Ex-Bolsonaro Minister in Banco Master Probe
title_cn: 巴西警方在银行主调查中瞄准前博尔索纳罗部长
summary: Brazilian police are targeting Ciro Nogueira, a powerful senator and ally of former President Jair Bolsonaro, as part of their probe into Banco Master, expanding a sweeping investigation that has roiled the nation’s political system.

title: Billionaire Sees Poland’s Small Nuclear Reactors Online in 2030
title_cn: 亿万富翁预计波兰小型核反应堆将于 2030 年上线
summary: Poland will see nuclear power entering its energy mix in less than five years as small reactors gain traction in the European country, predicted billionaire Michal Solowow.

title: Horn of Africa Tensions Flare as Sudan Adds Forces Near Ethiopia
title_cn: 苏丹在埃塞俄比亚附近增兵，非洲之角紧张局势加剧
summary: Sudan’s army is deploying more troops and anti-aircraft equipment near the Ethiopian border as it accuses Addis Ababa of backing its rebel opponents in a three-year civil war.

title: US Considers Tapping Oil at Military Bases to Refill Reserve
title_cn: 美国考虑在军事基地开采石油来补充储备
summary: The Trump administration is studying using oil under land at US military bases and other Department of War sites to help refill the nation’s depleted emergency reserves, according to a person familiar with the matter.

title: Rubio Discusses the Middle East With Pope After Trump Dispute
title_cn: 卢比奥在特朗普争端后与教皇讨论中东问题
summary: Secretary of State Marco Rubio met with Pope Leo XIV in the Vatican to discuss the conflict in the Middle East, following a public clash between the pontiff and President Donald Trump in recent weeks.

title: Leonardo Vote Narrowly Backs New Meloni Board After CEO Row
title_cn: 莱昂纳多在 CEO 争吵后以微弱优势投票支持新 Meloni 董事会
summary: Leonardo SpA shareholders narrowly approved the Italian government’s slate of board nominees, who overcame a protest vote over Rome’s decision to oust the defense company’s chief executive officer.

title: Iran’s President Says He Had Meeting With Injured Supreme Leader
title_cn: 伊朗总统称他会见了受伤的最高领袖
summary: Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian said he met with Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei in a rare public account of interactions with the country’s head of state who’s been in hiding since the start of the war with the US and Israel.

title: Thailand, Cambodia Pledge to Rebuild Ties After Deadly Clashes
title_cn: 泰国和柬埔寨承诺在致命冲突后重建关系
summary: Thailand and Cambodia pledged to rebuild bilateral relations, after long-simmering tensions erupted into deadly clashes last year, causing diplomatic ties between the Southeast Asian neighbors to be downgraded.

title: Demise of Crypto MAGA Sponsor in Poland Sparks Political Furor
title_cn: 波兰 Crypto MAGA 赞助商的消亡引发政治愤怒
summary: The downfall of Poland’s biggest digital asset trading platform is causing trouble for Donald Trump’s ally in the presidential palace.

title: US Waits on Iran’s Peace Deal Response as Israel Strikes Lebanon
title_cn: 以色列袭击黎巴嫩，美国等待伊朗和平协议回应
summary: The US is waiting on Iran to respond to its proposal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and end a war that’s killed thousands of people, with tensions still high in both the Persian Gulf and in Lebanon.

title: Brazil House Backs Critical Minerals Bill as Lula Meets Trump
title_cn: 卢拉会见特朗普时巴西众议院支持重要矿产法案
summary: Brazil’s lower house approved a bill to regulate the exploration of critical and strategic minerals, a step toward realizing the potential of the nation’s vast reserves as President Luiz Inacio Lula da Silva prepares to meet Donald Trump.

title: Germany’s Top Diplomat Says Merz, Trump Have ‘Solid’ Relations
title_cn: 德国最高外交官表示默茨与特朗普关系“牢固”
summary: Germany’s foreign minister sought to repair relations between President Donald Trump and Chancellor Friedrich Merz, saying the government in Berlin supports the US aim to ensure Iran can’t obtain a nuclear weapon.

title: US Official Thanks China for Iran Efforts, Touts Boeing Deal
title_cn: 美国官员感谢中国为伊朗所做的努力，并赞扬波音交易
summary: Senator Steve Daines thanked Beijing for encouraging Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, as the US searches for an off-ramp to a nine-week war that’s roiled global energy markets.

title: Funding Cut Threat Looms Over Johannesburg
title_cn: 约翰内斯堡面临资金削减威胁
summary: South Africa's government is turning up the pressure on Johannesburg, warning it could cut funding unless the city scraps a controversial wage deal. Bloomberg's Antony Sguazzin explains on Horizons Middle East & Africa. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Baltic States Warn of Unfunded Debt for Europe’s Defense Splurge
title_cn: 波罗的海国家警告欧洲国防开支资金不足的债务
summary: Officials on Europe’s eastern flank urged lawmakers to find sustainable sources of revenue to finance a massive surge in defense spending and avoid growing government borrowing across the continent.

title: Ukraine Looks Beyond Summer Offensive to a Crucial Winter in the War
title_cn: 乌克兰将目光从夏季攻势转向战争中关键的冬季
summary: Volodymyr Zelenskiy is asking Western allies to speed up deliveries of air-defense systems and interceptor missiles to prepare for another winter of intense bombing that could prove to be the next critical moment in Kyiv’s battle to resist the Russian invasion.

title: China Announces Suspended Death Sentences For Two Ex-Ministers
title_cn: 中国宣布对两名前部长暂缓执行死刑
summary: China on Thursday announced suspended death sentences for two former defense ministers convicted of graft, the first rulings since Chinese leader Xi Jinping started a sweeping military purge in 2023.

title: Affordability Concerns Rise as Trump, GOP’s Biggest Headache Grows
title_cn: 随着特朗普成为共和党最大的头痛问题，人们对负担能力的担忧加剧
summary: The issue that plagued Biden is now threatening to drag down Trump and the GOP

title: Trump’s Affordability Push Stalls Ahead of Midterm Elections
title_cn: 特朗普的负担能力在中期选举前陷入停滞
summary: The Trump administration’s fitful campaign to address US voters’ affordability concerns ahead of the midterm elections is faltering, with some key efforts stalled, cast aside or limited in scope.

title: The Billionaires Behind the Most Expensive Midterm Elections in History
title_cn: 历史上最昂贵的中期选举背后的亿万富翁
summary: Political committees have already raised $4.7 billion for the November contests as ultra-wealthy donors look to shape the final two years of Donald Trump's presidency.
